Osceola County Restaurant Health Grades

67%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
214Restaurants
3Cities

How clean are Osceola County's restaurants?67% of the 214 we grade hold an A, led by MAGIC MOMENT RESORT & KIDS CLUB at 100/100. 10 sit at D or F.

Cities in Osceola County

  • Kissimmee 175
  • St. Cloud 16
  • Celebration 11

Osceola County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Osceola County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 214 Osceola County restaurants we grade, 143 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Osceola County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Osceola County?

We currently publish 214 graded restaurants in Osceola County, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 143 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
